chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 179 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.8 & 25. 2. For orders on CMA No.1425/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1426/2019. 17.11.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2019 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today, when learned counsel was confronted that questions of law proposed for determination as the same were entirely predicted on proposition of evidence and were argumentative in nature. Counsel was called upon to articulate any question of law arising to warrant interference in reference jurisdiction, however, she remains unable to do so. Accordingly, the reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
